case_title: KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA PACIFIC CREDIT SERVICES VS. MOMODU KABAKAI FULLAH ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-17-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST TERRY ALAN DUREE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-28-2020, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-28-2020. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-16-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Continued To Jun-16-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Continued To Mar-17-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel TERY ALAN DUREE, ESQ is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAR-17-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Failure to appear for future matters may be subject to dismissal per Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)
